ast.name: log
ast.source: [CFN] View is not a CurrentFolderNotesDisplayView, recreating view
ast.target: [CFN] 视图不是 CurrentFolderNotesDisplayView，正在重新创建视图

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Notes containing these words will be hidden. Separate multiple words with commas.
ast.target: 包含这些词语的笔记将被隐藏。多个词语请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only notes containing these words will be shown. Leave empty to show all notes. Separate multiple words with commas.
ast.target: 仅显示包含这些词语的笔记。留空则显示所有笔记。多个词语请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show navigation links for previous and next notes.
ast.target: 显示上一篇和下一篇笔记的导航链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Convert note titles to Title Case for better readability.
ast.target: 将笔记标题转换为标题大小写以提高可读性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between minimal, fancy, and neobrutalist styles.
ast.target: 在极简、华丽和新粗野主义风格之间选择。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Make all the text bigger for easier clicking.
ast.target: 放大所有文本以便于点击。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only apply bigger text when using Obsidian on mobile devices.
ast.target: 仅在移动设备上使用 Obsidian 时应用放大文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show notes from subfolders within the current folder.
ast.target: 显示当前文件夹内子文件夹中的笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display headings from the currently active file at the top of the panel.
ast.target: 在面板顶部显示当前活动文件的标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display headings under each file in the folder notes list.
ast.target: 在文件夹笔记列表中每个文件下方显示标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Limit the number of files shown in the folder notes list. Use a lower value for better performance in large folders.
ast.target: 限制文件夹笔记列表中显示的文件数量。在大文件夹中使用较低值可提高性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually refresh the Current Folder Notes panel to apply changes.
ast.target: 手动刷新当前文件夹笔记面板以应用更改。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show outline in current file section
ast.target: 在当前文件部分显示大纲

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在文件列表中显示大纲

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not create a new leaf for the view
ast.target: 无法为视图创建新的叶子节点

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 当前文件夹笔记面板已刷新

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note is very large. Only showing headings from the first portion.
ast.target: 笔记非常大。仅显示第一部分的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Please open a note in a folder to view related notes.
ast.target: 请在文件夹中打开一个笔记以查看相关笔记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: The root folder cannot be shown to prevent performance issues with large vaults.
ast.target: 为防止大型仓库出现性能问题，无法显示根文件夹。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No notes found. If you have recently added or moved notes, Obsidian might still be indexing them. Please wait a moment and try again.
ast.target: 未找到笔记。如果您最近添加或移动了笔记，Obsidian 可能仍在索引它们。请稍等片刻后重试。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 正在显示当前笔记的大纲：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note is very large. Only showing first portion of headings.
ast.target: 笔记非常大。仅显示第一部分的标题。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how notes from the current folder are displayed in the panel.
ast.target: 配置当前文件夹中的笔记在面板中的显示方式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Control which notes appear in the folder notes panel.
ast.target: 控制哪些笔记出现在文件夹笔记面板中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Control how notes and their contents are displayed in the panel.
ast.target: 控制笔记及其内容在面板中的显示方式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure what content is included in the folder notes panel.
ast.target: 配置文件夹笔记面板中包含哪些内容。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Current Folder Notes displays notes and outlines from the current folder for quick navigation. Changes to settings will apply immediately.
ast.target: 当前文件夹笔记显示当前文件夹中的笔记和大纲，以便快速导航。对设置的更改将立即生效。
